name: Sanifoam Sunger Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Sanifoam S√É¬ºnger Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. provides insulation and cleaning products. It offers firex, polyester felt, melamine sponge, bondex, and flame retardant polyurethane sponge insulation products. The company also provides cleaning products, such as scrubber sponges, scouring balls and fibers, cleaning cloths, and bath and other sponges; detergents and personal care products; and raw-materials and semi-finished products. Its products are used in automotive, household appliance, sound insulation and acoustic arrangement, industrial insulation, and technical applications. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
